title: campanula patula subsp. peterfii
intro: Campanula patula subsp. peterfii, commonly known as Peter's bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Campanula patula subsp. peterfii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
